title: Rainfrog's Mantis Shrimps
description:
this is my first ever mod and I used MCreator to make it. it requires the gekolib mod.

this is a basic mod with armour, mobs achievents and weapons
body:
(this is my first ever mod and I will definitely make more mods in the future)

In this mod you will be able to find 3 different spiecies of mantis shrimp. after killing them you will get thier claw which you can use to make mantis armour and mantis arm blades. there are other things but you will have to play the mod to find out what they are.
